title: Panope stoechadifolia
taxonomy: Panope stoechadifolia is classified as a species of sea anemone, belonging to the family Actiniidae. This classification places it within the phylum Cnidaria and the kingdom Animalia. As a member of the Actiniidae family, Panope stoechadifolia is closely related to other sea anemones. Within the family, Panope stoechadifolia is further classified as the only species within the genus Panope. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Panope stoechadifolia.

preparations: Panope stoechadifolia, also known as Stoecha or Greek valerian, has been traditionally used in herbal preparations for its medicinal properties.
